untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg spread analysis across two delivery months (e.g., December vs July corn futures). Required calculations: (1) theoretical carry cost = (interest_rate × time / 12 × spot_price) + storage_costs, (2) actual spread price comparison to theoretical value, (3) liquidity assessment on both legs. The backtest engine processes single-instrument OHLCV data with standard indicators. Spread analysis, multi-leg position tracking, inter-month price differentials, and carry cost calculations are outside the scope of single-instrument indicator-based conditions. This requires a dedicated spread-trading or multi-leg derivatives module.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_60_0 is a classical cash-and-carry / basis trading signal from volatility/derivatives literature. It cannot be reduced to single-leg technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). To implement this signal: (1) create a custom spread instrument (Dec_Corn - Jul_Corn), (2) build a carry cost calculator module taking interest rates and storage fees as inputs, (3) implement spread convergence logic with time-decay monitoring near delivery, (4) manage dual positions with correlation and margin tracking. Recommend implementing as a separate spread-strategy engine or using a multi-leg framework outside this indicator-based backtest system.
